# vbi-switch



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                          | Type                                                                                               | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `checked`  | `checked`  | Whether the switch is checked.                       | `boolean`                                                                                          | `false`     |
| `color`    | `color`    | The color theme of the switch.                       | `"accent" \| "error" \| "info" \| "neutral" \| "primary" \| "secondary" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `undefined` |
| `disabled` | `disabled` | Whether the switch is disabled.                      | `boolean`                                                                                          | `false`     |
| `name`     | `name`     | The name of the component, used for form submission. | `string`                                                                                           | `''`        |
| `size`     | `size`     | The size of the switch.                              | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm" \| "xl" \| "xs"`                                                             | `undefined` |


## Events

| Event             | Description                                    | Type                   |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | ---------------------- |
| `vbiSwitchChange` | Emitted when the switch checked state changes. | `CustomEvent<boolean>` |
